positive: A stylized, minimalist silhouette illustration of a cosmic forest scene. Include highly detailed, bioluminescent flora and fauna, such as crystal-winged butterflies, glowing mushrooms, and hanging moon-lilies. The composition should feature a central, ancient-looking stylized tree with intricate, glowing roots, surrounded by a swirling nebula background. Use deep sapphire blue, vibrant emerald green, and soft cosmic gold as the primary color palette. The art style should be a blend of Art Nouveau curvature and Japanese woodblock print negative space, designed with clean, solid lines for optimal screen printing. High contrast, strong central focus, vector art quality, perfect for t-shirt print.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blur, artifacts, grain, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, messy, low resolution, poorly drawn, cropped, jpeg artifacts
